message:
ui(connect): default endpoint → https://rulake-mcp.ruv.io/

Live mcp-server now hosted on Cloud Run behind the rulake-mcp.ruv.io
Cloudflare CNAME (proxied=false; CNAME flattens to ghs.googlehosted.com
for Cloud Run domain mapping). Operators land on the Connect screen
already pre-pointed at a working live MCP — replaces the prior demo
placeholder URL.
